title: Machine Configuration
description: Machine-specific configuration for claude-dotfiles. Maps canonical variable names to local paths. Never commit this file — it contains paths specific to this machine.

name.description: Human-readable machine name. Use something you'll recognise across machines.

os.description: Operating system. Used to generate OS-appropriate commands in Claude sessions.

home.description: Absolute path to your home directory on this machine.

knowledge_root.description: Parent folder containing all your knowledge directories. All immediate subdirectories will be auto-discovered and their names used as variable names. Use this instead of listing every directory individually in knowledge_dirs.

knowledge_dirs.description: Named knowledge directories — where your thinking lives. Notes, docs, todos, tasks, plans, research. Keys become uppercase variable names in Claude sessions (e.g. 'notes' → $NOTES). Values are absolute paths on this machine. Use alongside knowledge_root or instead of it.

additionalProperties.description: Absolute path to this knowledge directory on this machine.

project_root.description: Where your code lives — git repositories, source files, compiled artefacts, and build outputs.
